# Total Space — Full Site Index

## Business Information
- **Name:** Total Space
- **Tagline:** Well-Lit. Well-Protected. Well-Managed. That's Total Space.
- **Address:** 1508 NC-218, Indian Trail, NC 28079
- **Phone:** (980) 455-8398
- **Email:** info@totalspace.com
- **Hours:** Sun-Sat: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- **County:** Union County, NC
- **Website:** https://www.totalspace.com/

## Services (4)
1. **RV Parking** — /services/rv-parking.html — Secure outdoor RV parking with gated access and surveillance
2. **Boat Parking** — /services/boat-parking.html — Safe, well-lit outdoor boat storage near Indian Trail
3. **Large Truck Parking** — /services/large-truck-parking.html — Commercial truck parking with wide-lane access
4. **Trailer Parking** — /services/trailer-parking.html — Tractor trailer and utility trailer outdoor parking

## Service Areas (5)
1. **Indian Trail, NC** — /cities/indian-trail-north-carolina.html — Primary service area, facility location
2. **Marshville, NC** — /cities/marshville-north-carolina.html — Union County eastern communities
3. **Mint Hill, NC** — /cities/mint-hill-north-carolina.html — Southeast Mecklenburg County
4. **Unionville, NC** — /cities/Unionville-noth-carolina.html — Union County central communities
5. **Weddington, NC** — /cities/Weddington-north-carolina.html — Southern Union County
